title: Pay - Canada.ca
content:
Making and transferring your tax payments electronically is secure, easy, and fast.
- Make a payment Making payments
- Transfer payments My Business Account : business owners Represent a Client : employees or a representatives acting on behalf of a business
- My Business Account : business owners
- Represent a Client : employees or a representatives acting on behalf of a business
